text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just can't keep still with my debut race so close! I
decide to go to the dojo to let off some steam
and wouldn't you know it, I run right into my
classmate, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno shares her super cool dream with me. She
wants her grandparents to see her race
formidable opponents to pay them back for
looking out for her!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We both promise to race each other one day. I'll
be Yaeno's formidable opponent and she'll be my
ultimate rival!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
RAAAAAH! I'm SOOO pumped up right now! I'm
ready to go, go, GO!
